title: balsamorhiza hispidula
intro: Balsamorhiza hispidula, also known as hairy balsamroot, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to western North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of hairy balsamroot include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as supporting digestion and reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Hairy balsamroot can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
